title: BeakMeshWall Firewall Rule (Stage A+B+C)
description: Unified firewall rule schema. A: 5-tuple. B: state + log. C: rate limit + named set references. Translated to native syntax (nftables/iptables/Windows Firewall) by agent driver. See docs/ROADMAP-CONFIG-MANAGEMENT.md.

stage.description: Schema stage tag. Optional; informational only.

action.description: What to do with matching packets.

direction.description: Traffic direction relative to the host.

comment.description: Free-form note. Will be embedded in native rule comment field where supported.

state.description: Stage B: connection states to match. Empty/absent = no state match.

log_enabled.description: Stage B: emit a log entry for matched packets.

log_prefix.description: Stage B: log message prefix. Stripped to 32 chars.

rate_limit.description: Stage C: per-rule rate limit. Packets exceeding count/period (with optional burst) are dropped (the verdict still depends on action; rate_limit gates how often the rule fires).

src_set.description: Stage C: name of a named set to match source IP against. Set must already exist on the target node (managed via /api/v1/sets/*).

dst_set.description: Stage C: name of a named set to match destination IP against.
